arts.ttl: Juventus faces uphill battle for Kolo Muani
arts.sum: Juventus finds themselves in a challenging position as they pursue Paris Saint-Germain striker Randal Kolo Muani, with Premier League clubs holding the advantage in the transfer race. The Italian giants, while primarily focused on bolstering their defence, are keeping a close eye on potential attacking reinforcements for the upcoming transfer window. The post Juventus faces uphill battle for Kolo Muani appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Big points up for grabs in Juventus vs. Fiorentina
arts.sum: Juventus have won each of their last three league games against Fiorentina, all by a score of 1-0; the Bianconeri have never recorded a longer streak of consecutive wins and clean sheets against the Viola in their Serie A history. Fiorentina have conceded no more than one goal in each of their last eight Serie A matches against Juventus (an average of 0.75 goals conceded per game); however, the Viola have recorded just two wins in this period (D2 L4).
